title: No space left on device: /var/log/app is full
description_md:
Alerts are firing: the `app` service on this box can no longer write to `/var/log/app` — every write fails with `No space left on device`. Someone left verbose debug logging on and it ran away overnight. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find what's eating the space on that filesystem, and free it up.

You're done when `/var/log/app` has a healthy amount of free space again (several MB).
